PUSHER_APP_ID.description: Laravel/Pusher app ID for the broadcaster instance.

PUSHER_APP_KEY.description: Public app key used by Laravel Echo and pusher-js clients.

PUSHER_APP_SECRET.description: Server-side app secret used to verify signed publish requests.

PUSHER_ENABLE_USER_AUTHENTICATION.description: Optional. Set to `true` to require `pusher:signin` or an authenticated private/presence subscription before the timeout expires.

USER_AUTHENTICATION_TIMEOUT_MS.description: Optional. Override the user-auth timeout in milliseconds. Defaults to `30000`.

APPS_JSON.description: Optional JSON array for multi-app mode, for example `[{"id":"app-id","key":"app-key","secret":"app-secret"}]`.
